items.title: Cells & Kernels
items.description: Colab uses the same cell/kernel execution model; the kernel just runs on a remote Google VM.

items.title: Magics & Shortcuts
items.description: %pip, ! shell commands and shortcuts work in Colab much as in local Jupyter.

items.title: os & pathlib
items.description: API keys come from Colab Secrets and are exposed via os.environ for SDKs.
